subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! Verily, this maidservant of Thine, who believeth in Thy signs, is assured of Thy words, and imploreth Thy Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان امتک المومنه بایاتک الموقنه بکلماتک المبتهله الی ملکوتک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @soul; spirit after death, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
